hero.title: Visit Miyagi
hero.subtitle: The Heart of Japan is Here
hero.description:
Beautiful landscapes woven by the sea, mountains, and history.
Miyagi Prefecture awaits you.

overview.desc1: A journey of cultural exploration from Sendai Castle Ruins
overview.desc2: Spectacular views from Matsushima, one of Japan's Three Great Scenic Sites, to Naruko Gorge
overview.desc3: Famous local specialties including gyutan and zunda mochi

matsushima.name: Matsushima
matsushima.desc: One of Japan's Three Great Scenic Sites. Spectacular scenery created by over 260 islands. Rich in cultural heritage including Zuiganji Temple and Godaido.

sendai.name: Sendai Castle Ruins
sendai.desc: Sendai Castle built by Date Masamune. The observation deck at the main garrison offers a panoramic view of Sendai city.

shiogama.name: Shiogama
shiogama.desc: A port town with the renowned Shiwahiko Shrine and Shiogama Shrine. Famous for fresh sushi and as a gateway to Matsushima.

naruko.name: Naruko Hot Spring
naruko.desc: A hot spring resort in Tohoku. Beautiful autumn foliage at Naruko Gorge. Cherished as a healing destination since ancient times.

kesennuma.name: Kesennuma
kesennuma.desc: A fishing town facing the Pacific Ocean. Abundant fresh seafood. The scenic beauty of the Karakuwa Peninsula is a must-see.

zao.name: Zao
zao.desc: Zao Echo Line and Okama, a beautiful volcanic crater lake. Enjoy both skiing and hot springs.

gyutan.name: Sendai Gyutan (Beef Tongue)
gyutan.desc: Salted and grilled beef tongue is Sendai's representative gourmet. The thick slices are irresistible.

zunda.name: Zunda Mochi
zunda.desc: Green sweet paste made from crushed edamame. Moderately sweet and addictively delicious.

kaki.name: Oysters
kaki.desc: Rich oysters from Matsushima Bay and Sanriku. Grilled or steamed oysters let you taste the season.

sasakama.name: Sasa Kamaboko
sasakama.desc: Sendai's local specialty. Kamaboko wrapped in bamboo leaves. Delicious both raw and grilled.

fukahire.name: Shark Fin
fukahire.desc: Kesennuma is one of Japan's leading shark fin producers. The silky-smooth soup is exquisite.

harako.name: Harako Rice
harako.desc: Local cuisine from Watari. Rice cooked in salmon broth topped with shredded salmon and plenty of salmon roe.

seasons.title: Seasonal Highlights
springItems: Thousand Cherry Blossoms at Shiroishi River Bank
Full-blooming cherry blossoms from Sendai Castle Ruins
Cherry blossom viewing at Maruoka Park

access.title: Access
access.lead: Sendai is the gateway to Northeast Japan

items: From Osaka Itami: Approx. 1 hour 10 minutes
From Kansai International: Approx. 1 hour 30 minutes
